steps.title: Identify what we know
steps.content: The equation $x + y = 56$ relates golden pothos cuttings ($x$) and satin pothos cuttings ($y$). We're told that $y = 21$ satin pothos cuttings are prepared. We need to find $x$.

steps.title: Substitute the known value and solve
steps.content:
Substitute $y = 21$ into the equation:
$$x + 21 = 56$$
Subtract 21 from both sides:
$$x = 56 - 21 = 35$$
That confirms B is correct.
